subjects.description: Two small crumpled white polythene bags of ordinary carrier-bag size, semi-transparent thin plastic material, lying flat and still on the asphalt road surface ahead of the ego vehicle on a calm, wind-free day
subjects.appearance_details: Both are ordinary small grocery carrier bags; one is slightly more crumpled, the other a little flatter; both have wrinkled, shiny surfaces catching light; faint printed text or logos partially visible on one bag
subjects.relationship: The bags are the perceived obstacles that cause the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop
subjects.location: Center foreground to center midground, on the road surface directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame, consistent with ordinary grocery-sized polythene bags; remaining small even as the vehicle closes distance and never appearing oversized
subjects.orientation: Lying at slightly different angles, resting still and flat on the road
subjects.pose: Lying flat on the road, still and motionless
subjects.action: Lying motionless on the asphalt in the still air, not moving
subjects.state_changes: The bags lie still on the road throughout; as the vehicle slows and stops, they become more prominent as small, still objects due to the reduced distance

background_setting: A coastal-town road under flat overcast noon light after recent rain, viewed from inside a moving vehicle; a sea-wall and grey water lie to one side and pastel seaside buildings to the other, the wet asphalt reflecting the pale sky. The air is calm with only a faint sea breeze that does not stir the road. Two small stray polythene bags lie still on the wet road ahead.

lighting.direction: Flat diffuse top light from a fully clouded sky
lighting.shadows: Soft shadowless light; wet-road sheen reflecting the pale sky around the bags
lighting.illumination_effect: Even low-contrast illumination with wet-road sheen and salt haze, the small white polythene bags clear against the wet grey asphalt

aesthetics.composition: First-person dashcam framing on the wet coastal road in one-point perspective, hood faintly visible at the bottom; sea-wall and buildings funnel attention to the small bags ahead
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool greys of overcast sky, wet asphalt and grey sea, spring pastels, with the small white polythene bags standing out as pale shapes
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Mundane damp seaside drive disrupted by a whimsical encounter; cautious, mildly humorous tension
aesthetics.patterns: Salt-worn lane markings reflected on the wet road; regular spacing of sea-wall posts

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving dashcam-style shot that decelerates sharply and abruptly to a complete stop early in the clip; subtle vibrations consistent with vehicle motion that smooth out once the vehicle halts and then holds completely static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's eye-level perspective, capturing the full road width and surrounding environment
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly above the road surface consistent with a sedan-height dashboard camera
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the bags; the surrounding roadside in the periphery remains reasonably sharp

context: Autonomous driving or dashcam scenario demonstrating a vehicle's cautious response to unexpected debris on the road, potentially for driver-assistance system training or road driving documentation

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward along the wet coastal road at a moderate speed; two small bags are visible ahead resting still on the wet road in the calm air.
The vehicle decelerates sharply and abruptly, braking hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02 on the wet asphalt, treating the small resting bags as obstacles.
The vehicle is fully stopped from the very start of this segment and remains completely stationary for the final three seconds; the small bags stay still on the wet road just a few meters ahead.

segments.description: The ego vehicle moves forward at a moderate speed along the wet coastal road, grey sea beyond the sea-wall. Ahead, two small white polythene bags rest still on the wet road in the calm air.
segments.key_changes: Polythene bags resolve from barely visible specks toward recognizable small shapes as the vehicle closes distance
segments.camera: Forward-moving dashcam perspective at moderate speed with slight vehicle vibration

segments.description: The vehicle brakes sharply and abruptly on the wet road, decelerating hard and coming to a complete stop by 0:02. The small bags remain still on the road ahead.
segments.key_changes: Speed drops rapidly to zero within this one second; a hard, abrupt halt completed by 0:02
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion decelerating sharply with a pronounced pitch-forward, settling quickly to stationary

segments.description: The vehicle is already fully stopped at the very start of this segment and remains completely motionless for the final three seconds, a few meters behind the bags above the wet coastal road, treating the harmless small bags as road obstacles.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle held at a full stop from the beginning of the segment; camera stationary with minimal idle vibration; bags remain still and motionless on the road
segments.camera: Stationary dashcam view with minimal vibration from idling engine

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the view from inside a vehicle shows a coastal-town road under flat overcast noon light after rain, grey sea beyond the sea-wall as the vehicle moves forward at a moderate pace in calm air; two small white polythene bags rest still on the wet road ahead. Around 0:01, the vehicle begins a sharp, abrupt deceleration, braking hard as the small bags sit motionless on the wet asphalt. By 0:02, the vehicle has come to a complete stop. From 0:02 to 0:05, the vehicle stays fully halted and motionless a few meters behind the two small polythene bags, which remain still on the wet coastal road.
audio_description: Ambient overcast coastal audio begins with wet tire roll, a soft sea breeze and distant surf with faint gull cries. Around 0:01 the engine note drops sharply and a brief hard-braking sound is audible as the vehicle decelerates abruptly. The breeze is faint and does not stir the bags. By 0:02 the tire noise falls to near silence and, from 0:02 to 0:05, a low idle rumble dominates with distant surf while the bags rest silently on the wet road.
